headlines.description: Sevilla FC were held to a 1-1 draw at home to FC Salzburg after a chaotic first half in which four penalties were awarded, three to the visitors.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sevilla, Salzburg draw in chaotic UCL match

headlines.description: Manchester United suffered a stoppage-time 2-1 defeat away to Young Boys after a calamitous defensive mistake in their Champions League opener.
headlines.shortLinkText: USMNT's Pefok nets late winner to beat Man Utd

headlines.description: Bayern Munich defeated Barcelona 3-0 thanks to a goal from Thomas Muller and a brace from Robert Lewandowski.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bayern beat Barca on Lewandowski's brace

headlines.description: Champions League holders Chelsea got their new campaign off to a winning start as they beat Zenit St Petersburg 1-0 at Stamford Bridge.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lukaku goal gives Chelsea UCL win over Zenit

headlines.description: Denys Garmash survived a red card after referee Anthony Taylor mistakenly showed the Dynamo Kiev substitute a second yellow card.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dynamo's Garmash survives red card after ref mix-up

headlines.description: Lille kicked off their Champions League campaign in disappointing fashion as they were held to a 0-0 home draw by 10-man VfL Wolfsburg.
headlines.shortLinkText: USMNT's Brooks sent off in Lille-Wolfsburg draw

headlines.description: Forwards Paolo Dybala and Alvaro Morata scored just before half-time as Juventus made the most of Malmo's collapse to win 3-0.
headlines.shortLinkText: Juve roll past Malmo with Dybala, Morata goals

headlines.description: A late Robin Gosens equaliser earned Atalanta a 2-2 draw at Villarreal on Tuesday as the Spanish side made their first appearance in 10 years.
headlines.shortLinkText: Gosens strikes late to give Atalanta draw at Villarreal

headlines.description: Jude Bellingham produced an inspired  performance as he scored one goal and set up the other to help Borussia Dortmund to a 2-1 win at Besiktas.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bellingham, Haaland net in Dortmund's UCL win

headlines.description: Sheriff Tiraspol enjoyed a dream Champions League debut as Moldova's first group-stage representatives stunned Shakhtar Donetsk with a 2-0 victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Newcomers Sheriff shock Shakhtar on UCL debut

headlines.description: Atletico Madrid drew 0-0 at home to Porto in a cagey opening Champions League Group B game on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Atletico draw with Porto as VAR denies visitors

headlines.description: Star-studded Paris Saint-Germain were held to a surprising 1-1 draw by Club Brugge on Wednesday night in Group A in Flanders.
headlines.shortLinkText: Messi starts, Mbappe hurt in Brugge-PSG draw

headlines.description: — Inter Milan was made to pay for its profligacy as a late goal from substitute Rodrygo saw Real Madrid snatch a 1-0 win in their Champions League opener on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Last-gasp Rodrygo goal sees Real Madrid beat Inter 1-0

headlines.description: — Jordan Henderson capped Liverpool's second-half comeback with a brilliantly controlled finish to clinch a 3-2 win over AC Milan in the Champions League on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Henderson clinches 3-2 win for Liverpool over AC Milan in CL

headlines.description: Christopher Nkunku scored a hat-trick for RB Leipzig but ended on the losing side in a nine-goal thriller as Manchester City won 6-3.
headlines.shortLinkText: Man City survive Nkunku triple in 9-goal thriller

headlines.description: Sebastien Haller scored four goals as Ajax Amsterdam picked apart Portuguese hosts Sporting CP for a one-sided 5-1 victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Haller nets four as Ajax hammer Sporting CP

headlines.description: Steven Berghuis scored one goal and set up another as Ajax were comfortable 2-0 winners over injury-hit Besiktas in their Champions League match.
headlines.shortLinkText: Berghuis helps Ajax to Champions League win over Besiktas

headlines.description: Shakhtar Donetsk and Inter Milan battled to a drab 0-0 draw on in their Champions League Group D match on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Shakhtar hold Inter to goalless draw as Usyk looks on

headlines.description: Luis Suarez's last-gasp penalty and Antoine Griezmann's first goal since returning to Atletico Madrid earned the Spanish side a 2-1 victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Last-gasp Suarez penalty earns Atletico win over 10-man Milan

headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund beat Sporting 1-0 thanks to Donyell Malen's first goal for the club in their Champions League Group C match.
headlines.shortLinkText: Malen's maiden goal hands Dortmund 1-0 win over Sporting

headlines.description: Liverpool continued their perfect start in Champions League Group B with a comfortable 5-1 win against Porto.
headlines.shortLinkText: Salah, Firmino at the double as Liverpool win big

headlines.description: Lionel Messi's superb first goal for PSG punished Pep Guardiola's Manchester City 2-0 in the Champions League group stage on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Messi lifts PSG past Guardiola's City in UCL win

headlines.description: Club Brugge fought back from an early goal down to post an unexpected 2-1 win at RB Leipzig in the Champions League on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brugge recover to win 2-1 at Leipzig

headlines.description: Real Madrid suffered a shock 2-1 loss to upstart side Sheriff Tiraspol in the return of Champions League action to the renovated Bernabeu stadium.
headlines.shortLinkText: New Sheriff in town: Moldovan club stuns Madrid

headlines.description: Atalanta maintained their good start in the Champions League after an opportunist goal from Matteo Pessina saw them beat Young Boys 1-0.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pessina strike gives Atalanta win over Young Boys

name: Malmö FF at Zenit St Petersburg

headlines.description: Zenit St Petersburg notched the first win of their Champions League Group H campaign with a 4-0 victory over Swedish side Malmo FF.
headlines.shortLinkText: Zenit cruise to 4-0 win over 10-man Malmo

headlines.description: Bayern Munich striker Robert Lewandowski scored twice as the German champions crushed Dynamo Kiev 5-0 in their Champions League Group E game.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lewandowski brace as Bayern thrash Dynamo Kiev

headlines.description: Thomas Tuchel suffered his second successive 1-0 defeat as Juventus claimed victory over Chelsea in the Champions League on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chiesa goal gives Juventus victory over Chelsea

headlines.description: Cristiano Ronaldo scored a stoppage-time winner for Manchester United as they came from behind to win against Villarreal at Old Trafford.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ronaldo's late goal rescues below-par Man Utd

headlines.description: Teenager Karim Adeyemi scored two penalties to earn RB Salzburg a 2-1 home victory over Lille as they took command of Group G.
headlines.shortLinkText: Adeyemi penalties earn Salzburg win over Lille

headlines.description: Sevilla's Ivan Rakitic scored a hotly-disputed penalty three minutes from time as they rescued a 1-1 draw at Wolfsburg.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sevilla's Rakitic snatches point with penalty at Wolfsburg

headlines.description: — Sebastian Coates waited years to score his first Champions League goal but only 12 minutes for the next one, a near-exact copy.
headlines.shortLinkText: Coates heads 2 goals as Sporting Lisbon beats Besiktas 4-1

headlines.description: Manchester City eased to a comfortable 5-1 win at Club Brugge in the Champions League on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Man City thrash Club Brugge in easy UCL win

headlines.description: Ajax produced a dominant showing to rout Borussia Dortmund 4-0 on Tuesday and keep up their 100% record in the Champions League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ajax thrash Dortmund to continue perfect run

headlines.description: Liverpool secured a thrilling 3-2 victory over Atletico Madrid in the Champions League on Tuesday at the Wanda Metropolitano.
headlines.shortLinkText: Griezmann sees red as Liverpool edge Atletico

headlines.description: Porto's Luis Diaz scored the winner as they kept their Champions League knockout hopes alive with a 1-0 victory over AC Milan in Group B.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dazzling Diaz hands Porto win over Milan

headlines.description: Inter Milan ended Sheriff Tiraspol's perfect start to their debut Champions League campaign with a 3-1 win at San Siro on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Inter inflict first Champions League defeat on Sheriff

headlines.description: PSG's Kylian Mbappe and Lionel Messi found their groove as they inspired their side to a 3-2 comeback victory at home to RB Leipzig.
headlines.shortLinkText: Messi, Mbappe lead PSG over Marsch's Leipzig

headlines.description: — Vinícius Júnior scored twice, including a wondrous solo goal, to lead Real Madrid to a 5-0 victory over Shakhtar Donetsk and put its Champions League campaign back on track on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Vinícius double leads Real Madrid to 5-0 rout at Shakhtar

headlines.description: Barcelona have halted their worst-ever start to a Champions League campaign as they claimed a 1-0 win over Dynamo Kiev at the Camp Nou on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Barca halt worst-ever UCL start with Dynamo win

headlines.description: — Salzburg's young squad took a big step closer to reaching the Champions League knockout stage with a 3-1 win over Wolfsburg on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Salzburg beats Wolfsburg to extend group lead in CL

headlines.description: Bayern Munich struck four times in a frantic 15-minute spell late in the second half to cruise past Benfica Lisbon 4-0 on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bayern crush Benfica 4-0 with 4 goals in 15 mins

headlines.description: — Injuries to strikers Romelu Lukaku and Timo Werner marred Chelsea's impressive 4-0 win over Malmo in the Champions League on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lukaku, Werner injured as Chelsea beats Malmo 4-0 in CL

headlines.description: Lille were held to a 0-0 home draw by Sevilla on Wednesday to continue their miserable winless Champions League run.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lille continue winless Champions League run with Sevilla draw

headlines.description: Cristiano Ronaldo scored a late goal as Manchester United mounted a second-half rally to beat Atalanta 3-2 in Champions League group-stage action.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ronaldo scores late, Man Utd win epic rally

headlines.description: Yeremi Pino and Gerard Moreno scored for Villarreal as they claimed a first Champions League group stage win in 13 years in a win over Young Boys.
headlines.shortLinkText: Birthday boy Pino helps Villarreal thump Young Boys

headlines.description: Dejan Kulusevski scored a late goal to earn Juventus a 1-0 victory away to Zenit St Petersburg on Wednesday in the Champions League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kulusevski strikes late to earn Juventus win over Zenit

headlines.description: Chelsea took a huge step towards the Champions League knockout stages with a hard-fought 1-0 win against Malmo in Sweden on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Strikerless Chelsea edge past Malmo in UCL

headlines.description: — Salzburg was made to wait to secure qualification for the Champions League knockout rounds after losing 2-1 at Wolfsburg on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Salzburg's Champions League push stalls in loss to Wolfsburg

headlines.description: Cristiano Ronaldo saved Manchester United in the Champions League again as his stoppage time goal earned them a 2-2 draw away to Atalanta.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ronaldo saves Man Utd in Champions League

headlines.description: Robert Lewandowski scored a hat-trickand missed a penalty in his 100th Champions League appearance as Bayern Munich crushed Benfica 5-2.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lewa scores three as Bayern reach UCL knockouts

headlines.description: Ansu Fati's second-half goal gave Barcelona the 1-0 win over Dynamo Kiev in Champions League action.
headlines.shortLinkText: Fati stunner gives Barca win over Dynamo Kiev

headlines.description: Juventus booked their spot in the Champions League last 16 with two group games to spare by beating Zenit St Petersburg.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dybala helps Juve book UCL knockout spot

headlines.description: Jonathan Ikone scored a second-half winner as Lille fought back to claim a 2-1 victory over hosts Sevilla in their Champions League Group G clash.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ikone winner gives Lille to victory in Seville

headlines.description: Villarreal boosted their hopes of reaching the Champions League knockout stage after goals from Etienne Capoue and Arnaut Danjuma.
headlines.shortLinkText: Villarreal on course for UCL last 16 in win over Young Boys

headlines.description: AC Milan earned their first Champions League point of the season with a 1-1 draw against Porto at San Siro on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Milan on brink of UCL exit after draw with Porto

headlines.description: Karim Benzema scored twice to steer Real Madrid past Shakhtar Donetsk in a 2-1 victory at the Bernabeu in the Champions League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Benzema nets landmark goals in Madrid UCL win

headlines.description: Ajax came from behind to beat 10-man Borussia Dortmund 3-1 in Champions League Group C and advance to the knockout stages of the Champions League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ajax beat Dortmund, into Champions League last 16

headlines.description: Liverpool maintained their perfect start to the Champions League with a win over Atletico Madrid at Anfield on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Liverpool beat Atleti to stay perfect in UCL play

headlines.description: Manchester City prepared for this weekend's derby with a comfortable 4-1 victory over Club Brugge in the Champions League on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Man City prepare for derby with big UCL win

headlines.description: RB Leipzig rescued a 2-2 draw against PSG with a stoppage-time penalty but the result saw them knocked out of the Champions League on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Marsch's Leipzig out of UCL after draw with PSG

headlines.description: A ruthless second-half performance earned Inter Milan a 3-1 win away to Sheriff Tiraspol on Wednesday to send them above the Moldovans into second.
headlines.shortLinkText: Inter go second with comfortable win at Sheriff

headlines.description: A double from Pedro Goncalves helped Sporting to a dominant 4-0 Champions League home win over Besiktas on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sporting steamroller Besiktas in Champions League win

headlines.description: Bayern Munich, missing players to COVID-19 quarantine, edged past Dynamo Kiev 2-1 to secure top spot in Champions League group stage action.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lewy super-goal leads COVID-hit Bayern to win

headlines.description: — A smart piece of improvisation by Cristiano Ronaldo helped send Manchester United into the last 16 of the Champions League as Michael Carrick’s spell as the English club’s interim manager began with a 2-0 win at Villarreal on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ronaldo helps Man U into CL's last 16 with win at Villarreal

headlines.description: Barcelona and Benfica played out a thrilling goalless draw in the Champions League in Xavi Hernandez's second match in charge.
headlines.shortLinkText: Barca in UCL knockout round jeopardy after draw

headlines.description: — Inflicting the heaviest Champions League defeat on Juventus and reaching the knockout stage was satisfying enough for Chelsea. Having three academy graduates supply goals made it a perfect night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Academy graduates send Chelsea through with CL win over Juve

headlines.description: Jonathan David netted the only goal as Lille brushed aside their dismal domestic form to beat RB Salzburg 1-0 at home on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Prolific David strikes again to take Lille top

name: Zenit St Petersburg at Malmö FF

headlines.description: A last-gasp penalty by Yaroslav Rakitskiy earned 10-man Zenit St Petersburg a 1-1 draw at Malmo FF in their Champions League Group H clash.
headlines.shortLinkText: Zenit qualify for Europa League following draw with Malmo

headlines.description: Joan Jordan scored an early goal as Sevilla beat Wolfsburg 2-0 in their Champions League clash at the Estadio Ramon Sanchez Pizjuan on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jordan sinks Wolfsburg as Sevilla stay in hunt for knockout ph

headlines.description: Atalanta's Luis Muriel came off the bench to equalise two minutes from time and snatch a 3-3 draw at Young Boys in a frenetic finish.
headlines.shortLinkText: Atalanta grab last-gasp goal in draw at Young Boys amid late flurry

headlines.description: Sebastien Haller added to his impressive Champions League goal tally as Ajax came from behind to beat Besiktas  2-1 on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Haller nets brace as Ajax stay flawless in UCL

headlines.description: Edin Dzeko scored twice in the space of six second-half minutes to earn Inter Milan a 2-0 win over Shakhtar Donetsk at San Siro on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dzeko double downs Shakhtar to put Inter on brink of last-16

headlines.description: A stunning header from Junior Messias in the dying minutes gave AC Milan a 1-0 win over Atletico Madrid to keep their Champions League hopes alive.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ex-delivery man Messias leads Milan past Atleti

headlines.description: RB Leipzig scored four goals in a rampant first-half performance and added one more after the break to beat Club Brugge 5-0.
headlines.shortLinkText: Five-star Leipzig thrash Brugge after rampant first half

headlines.description: — Thiago Alcantara’s sublime long-range strike and Mohamed Salah’s latest individual goal maintained Liverpool’s perfect record in its Champions League group with a 2-0 win over Porto on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Liverpool makes it 5 wins from 5 in Champions League

headlines.description: Striker Gabriel Jesus scored a late winner as Manchester City came from behind to beat Paris Saint-Germain 2-1 in the Champions League on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jesus strikes late as City rally to beat PSG

headlines.description: Real Madrid secured their spot in the knockout rounds of the Champions League with a comfortable 3-0 win at Sheriff Tiraspol on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Real Madrid avenge shock Sheriff defeat

headlines.description: Sporting CP beat 10-man Borussia Dortmund 3-1 on Wednesday with two goals from Pedro Goncalves to clinch their Champions League last-16 spot.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sporting clinch last-16 spot with win over Dortmund

headlines.description: Kylian Mbappe and Lionel Messi scored two apiece as Paris Saint-Germain beat Club Brugge 4-1 at the Parc des Princes on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mbappe, Messi net two each in PSG win in UCL

headlines.description: RB Leipzig beat Manchester City 2-1 in their final Champions League Group A match at the Red Bull Arena.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leipzig claim dramatic victory over Man City

headlines.description: — Liverpool made it a perfect six in the Champions League group stage by winning 2-1 at AC Milan as the Italian team’s return to Europe’s premier club competition came to a swift end on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Liverpool stays perfect in CL with 2-1 win at AC Milan

headlines.description: Sebastien Haller kept up his scoring streak to help Ajax Amsterdam end the Champions League group stage with a 100% record as they beat Sporting CP.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ajax beat Sporting to maintain perfect UCL record

headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund's Marco Reus and Erling Haaland each scored twice in a 5-0 win over Besiktas in their final Champions League Group C game.
headlines.shortLinkText: Haaland, Reus lead Europa-bound BVB over Besiktas

headlines.description: Atletico Madrid snatched a place in the Champions League last 16 as they won 3-1 at Porto on Tuesday in a tense and ill-tempered game.
headlines.shortLinkText: Atletico reach UCL knockouts with tense win at Porto

headlines.description: Toni Kroos and Marco Asensio scored as Real Madrid beat Inter Milan 2-0 at the Bernabeu on Tuesday to finish confirm top spot in Group D.
headlines.shortLinkText: Real beat 10-man Inter with Kroos, Asensio goals

headlines.description: Sheriff Tiraspol ended their Champions League campaign with a 1-1 draw at Shakhtar Donetsk.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sheriff end UCL campaign with draw at Shakhtar

headlines.description: Juventus progressed to the Champions League knockout stages as group winners after their comfortable 1-0 victory over Malmo on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Juve sneak into top spot with win over Malmo

headlines.description: Champions League holders Chelsea blew the chance to top their group as they were held to a 3-3 draw against Zenit St Petersburg.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chelsea blow top spot in UCL with last-gasp draw

headlines.description: Bayern Munich beat Barcelona to send the LaLiga side out of the Champions League knockout rounds and into the Europa League on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Barca miss UCL knockouts after loss to Bayern

headlines.description: — A heavily rotated Manchester United team held Young Boys to a 1-1 draw in their Champions League group closer on Wednesday, ending the Swiss side’s involvement in European competition this season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Heavily rotated Man United holds Young Boys 1-1 in CL

headlines.description: Noah Okafor scored the only goal of the game as FC Salzburg claimed a 1-0 victory over 10-man Sevilla at the Red Bull Arena on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Okafor sees Salzburg to historic win over Sevilla

headlines.description: Lille reached the knockout stage of the Champions League for the second time when they claimed an emphatic 3-1 win at Wolfsburg.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lille beat Wolfsburg to top Group G, reach Champions League last 16

headlines.description: Villarreal reached the Champions League knockout stages as Arnaut Danjuma's double helped them to a 3-2 win at Atalanta.
headlines.shortLinkText: Villarreal beat Atalanta in snow-delayed game to reach UCL last-16

headlines.description: Kylian Mbappe scored a dramatic stoppage-time winner as Paris Saint-Germain beat Real Madrid 1-0 in the Champions League round-of-16 first leg.
headlines.shortLinkText: Late Mbappe winner as PSG beat Madrid in UCL

headlines.description: Manchester City have one foot in the Champions League quarterfinals after an impressive 5-0 win at Sporting Lisbon on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Man City hit five at Sporting in UCL thrashing

headlines.description: Roberto Firmino and Mohamed Salah scored as Liverpool won 2-0 against Inter Milan in their Champions League round-of-16 first-leg.
headlines.shortLinkText: Firmino, Salah score as Liverpool beat Inter

headlines.description: Bayern Munich netted a late equaliser in a 1-1 draw to FC Salzburg in the first-leg of their Champions League round-of-16 clash on Wednesday
headlines.shortLinkText: Bayern strike late to snatch draw at Salzburg

headlines.description: — Chelsea could rely on Christian Pulisic and Kai Havertz for goals with misfiring Romelu Lukaku rested.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pulisic, Havertz supply Chelsea CL goals with Lukaku dropped

headlines.description: Dusan Vlahovic scored the fastest Champions League goal by a debutant starter as Juve and Villarreal drew 1-1 in their round-of-16 first leg clash.
headlines.shortLinkText: Vlahovic nets in UCL debut as Juve-Villarreal draw

headlines.description: Manchester United earned a 1-1 draw against Atletico Madrid as a late Anthony Elanga goal cancelled out Joao Felix's stunning first-half header.
headlines.shortLinkText: Felix, Elanga net as Atletico-Man United draw

headlines.description: Ajax and Benfica played out a 2-2 draw at the Estadio da Luz on Wednesday in their Champions League round of 16 first leg tie.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ukraine's Yaremchuk sends message in UCL draw

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Bayern Munich advance 8-2 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Bayern Munich advance 8-2 on aggregate

headlines.description: — Whatever hope Salzburg had of overcoming Bayern Munich was extinguished by Robert Lewandowski scoring a hat trick in 11 minutes.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lewandowski's 11-minute hat trick helps Bayern advance in CL

headlines.description: — Liverpool could cope with its first Anfield loss in a year to still overcome Inter Milan and reach the quarterfinals of the Champions League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Liverpool reaches CL quarterfinals despite loss to Inter

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Manchester City advance 5-0 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Manchester City advance 5-0 on aggregate

headlines.description: Manchester City cruised into the Champions League quarterfinals, playing out a goalless draw with Sporting Lisbon to progress 5-0 on aggregate.
headlines.shortLinkText: City complete cruise into UCL quarterfinals

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Real Madrid advance 3-2 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Real Madrid advance 3-2 on aggregate

headlines.description: Karim Benzema produced a memorable hat trick as Real Madrid completed a stunning comeback to dump Paris Saint-Germain out of the Champions League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Benzema treble stuns PSG as Real earn UCL win

headlines.description: Darwin Nunez struck late in the second half as Benfica beat Ajax Amsterdam on Tuesday night to advance to the Champions League quarterfinals.
headlines.shortLinkText: Nunez sends Benfica past Ajax into UCL quarters

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Atlético Madrid advance 2-1 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Atlético Madrid advance 2-1 on aggregate

headlines.description: Atletico Madrid dumped Manchester United out of the Champions League round of 16 after edging to a 1-0 victory at Old Trafford on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Man United exit UCL in narrow defeat vs. Atletico

headlines.description: Villarreal beat Juventus 3-0 in the Champions League round of 16 on Wednesday to reach the quartetrfinals with a 4-1 victory on aggregate.
headlines.shortLinkText: Juve crash out of UCL after humbling vs. Villarreal

headlines.description: Christian Pulisic scored as Chelsea claimed a 2-1 victory away to Lille on Wednesday to advance to the Champions League quarterfinals.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pulisic nets as Chelsea advance past Lille in UCL

headlines.description: A late Luis Diaz goal gave Liverpool a commanding  3-1 lead over Benfica after Tuesday's Champions League quarterfinal first leg in Lisbon.
headlines.shortLinkText: Liverpool strike late to take control vs. Benfica

headlines.description: — Kevin De Bruyne scored the only goal to give Manchester City a 1-0 win over Atletico Madrid in the first leg of their Champions League quarterfinal on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: De Bruyne gives Man City 1-0 edge over Atletico Madrid in CL

headlines.description: Karim Benzema continued his rampant form this season, with his hat trick leading Real Madrid to a 3-1 win over Chelsea in their UCL quarterfinal.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brilliant Benzema triple leads Real past Chelsea

headlines.description: Villarreal inflicted Bayern Munich's first away defeat in the Champions League for almost five years as they won their quarterfinal first leg 1-0.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bayern upset by Villarreal for rare UCL away loss

headlines.description: Samuel Chukwueze scored a sensational breakaway goal to send Villarreal into the Champions League semifinals at the expense of Bayern Munich.
headlines.shortLinkText: Villarreal stun Bayern to book UCL semi spot

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Real Madrid advance 5-4 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Real Madrid advance 5-4 on aggregate

headlines.description: Karim Benzema stole the show once again as Real Madrid eliminated Chelsea from the Champions League at the Bernabeu with a 5-4 aggregate win.
headlines.shortLinkText: Benzema heads Real past Chelsea into UCL semis

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Manchester City advance 1-0 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Manchester City advance 1-0 on aggregate

headlines.description: Manchester City secured their place in the Champions League semifinals after a goalless draw with Atletico Madrid on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: City hold off Atletico to reach semifinals

headlines.description: Roberto Firmino scored twice as Liverpool drew 3-3 with Benfica on Wednesday to advance to the Champions League semifinals 6-4 on aggregate.
headlines.shortLinkText: Firmino brace as Liverpool cruise into UCL semis

headlines.description: — It was the coolest of penalties at the end of one of the wildest matches in Champions League history.
headlines.shortLinkText: Benzema keeps Madrid alive in CL despite 4-3 loss to City

headlines.description: Liverpool claimed a dominant 2-0 victory over Villarreal in the Champions League semifinal first leg at Anfield on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Liverpool ease past Villarreal in dominant win

headlines.description: Liverpool overcame a rocky first half to beat Villarreal 3-2 to book a spot in the Champions League final, winning the tie 5-2 on aggregate.
headlines.shortLinkText: Liverpool reach Champions League final after scare

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Real Madrid advance 6-5 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Real Madrid advance 6-5 on aggregate

headlines.description: Real Madrid produced one of the all-time great European comebacks to stun Manchester City and book a Champions League final against Liverpool.
headlines.shortLinkText: Real Madrid stun Man City to reach UCL final

headlines.description: — Real Madrid became European champion for a record-extending 14th time after beating Liverpool 1-0 in a Champions League final that started 37 minutes late because of disturbing crowd issues outside the Stade de France on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Real Madrid beats Liverpool 1-0 for 14th European Cup title
